rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in component type scopes for port-level assumptions and guarantees, and in implementation scopes for subcomponent bindings.
Use annex agree {** ... **}; blocks for AGREE contract content.
generic_rules: For component type contracts, place input assumptions and output guarantees only when concrete bounds or visible relations are provided.
Do not reference implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes.
Ensure AGREE expression types match AADL types (bool, int, real) to avoid type mismatch errors.
Avoid encoding AADL timing properties as AGREE variables unless explicit typed ports or constants are available.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts use `assume`, `guarantee`, `eq`, `const`, and `assign` syntax within `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type scopes or use subcomponent ports in type-level contracts.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
